notes: prerequisite_expression preserves course-code AND/OR logic when the requirement is course-only.
edges is a flattened graph view; use prerequisite_expression when OR/AND semantics matter.
non_course and mixed requirements keep the official raw text because they include entrance exam, language score, or equivalence conditions.
